task: geometry/noise conditioned inverse operator for BOST 3D reconstruction
rule: No single public source closes the full measurement chain. Use each source only for the evidence role stated below.

datasets.physical_domain: high-speed flow over a flight body
datasets.dimensions: 70 real BOS views plus calibration, masks, deflections and reconstructions
datasets.minimum_local_subset: readme, code, one reference/flow-on pair, masks, deflections and calibration for selected views
datasets.license: public release cleared under PA# AFRL-2025-4347; no standard software/data license was found in the supplied readme, so redistribution remains disabled
datasets.allowed_claim: real-image interface, geometry dropout, held-out-view consistency and runtime

datasets.dimensions: 30 real and 30 LES trajectories, 2001 frames, 128x128; numerical branch has 15 channels
datasets.download_size: about 67 GB in the Hugging Face Arrow release; raw distribution page reports about 110 GB
datasets.minimum_local_subset: metadata and one real trajectory first; one numerical trajectory only after a storage check
datasets.allowed_claim: reacting-flow temporal representation, modality masking and sim-to-real transfer

datasets.dimensions: 2D unsteady pressure, velocity, temperature and species fields; 30000 time steps
datasets.download_size: 58.4 GB full; 2.7 MB grid and 4.66 MB sample package are separately downloadable
datasets.allowed_claim: temporal operator debugging on a reacting-flow field

datasets.minimum_local_subset: not yet available as a small official shard
datasets.license: SDRBench requires citation, source acknowledgement and checking source publication conditions
datasets.allowed_claim: 3D morphology stress test after generating an independent optical forward model
datasets.forbidden_claim: multi-sample learning or generalization from one snapshot

datasets.dimensions: solver suite and test cases, not a precomputed training corpus
datasets.download_size: 25.6 MB source archive before generated cases
datasets.minimum_local_subset: source, one documented test case and its license
datasets.allowed_claim: independent CFD generator and cross-family field stress testing

datasets.physical_domain: analytic Gaussian, front-like and controlled synthetic fields
datasets.allowed_claim: implementation correctness, mechanism falsification and compute accounting
